body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-DIS-003](task-0159): Optional Provider Seams

## Purpose

Implement optional zeroconf and external registry provider seams.

## Scope

- Zeroconf seam
- External registry seam
- Configuration

## Implementation

1. Define seams
2. Implement zeroconf
3. Implement external

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Seams defined
2. Zeroconf works
3. External works
